input.prompt:
I need to understand how this project generates peer reviews for papers. Specifically:

1. How does `make app_cli` work? What arguments does it accept?
2. What is the paper ID format (e.g., '1105.1072') - is this an arXiv ID?
3. What agents are involved in the review pipeline?
4. What is the agent system architecture - how do agents collaborate?
5. What configuration/environment is needed (API keys, models)?
6. How does the dataset (PeerRead) work?

Look at:
- src/run_cli.py
- src/app/app.py
- src/app/agents/ directory
- src/app/data_utils/ directory
- src/app/data_models/ directory
- Makefile (app_cli target)
- .env or .env.example for required config

Return a comprehensive summary of how to run a review for a specific paper.

1â†’"""
     2â†’Lightweight CLI wrapper for the Agents-eval application.
     3â†’
     4â†’This wrapper handles help and basic argument parsing quickly without
     5â†’loading heavy dependencies. It only imports the main application
     6â†’when actual processing is needed.
     7â†’"""
     8â†’
     9â†’import argparse
    10â†’import shutil
    11â†’from sys import argv, exit
    12â†’from typing import Any
    13â†’
    14â†’from app.config.config_app import OUTPUT_PATH
    15â†’from app.data_models.app_models import PROVIDER_REGISTRY
    16â†’
    17â†’_parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Agents-eval CLI â€” run MAS evaluation pipeline")
    18â†’
    19â†’for _flag, _help in [
    20â†’    ("--version", "Display version information"),
    21â†’    ("--include-researcher", "Include the researcher agent"),
    22â†’    ("--include-analyst", "Include the analyst agent"),
    23â†’    ("--include-synthesiser", "Include the synthesiser agent"),
    24â†’    ("--pydantic-ai-stream", "Enable streaming output"),
    25â†’    ("--download-peerread-full-only", "Download all PeerRead data and exit (setup mode)"),
    26â†’    ("--download-peerread-samples-only", "Download PeerRead sample and exit (setup mode)"),
    27â†’    ("--cc-teams", "Use Claude Code Agent Teams mode (requires --engine=cc)"),
    28â†’    ("--no-llm-suggestions", "Disable LLM-assisted suggestions in generated report"),
    29â†’]:
    30â†’    _parser.add_argument(_flag, action="store_true", default=None, help=_help)
    31â†’
    32â†’# S8-F6.1: --generate-report and --skip-eval are mutually exclusive
    33â†’_eval_group = _parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group()
    34â†’_eval_group.add_argument(
    35â†’    "--skip-eval",
    36â†’    action="store_true",
    37â†’    default=None,
    38â†’    help="Skip evaluation after run_manager completes",
    39â†’)
    40â†’_eval_group.add_argument(
    41â†’    "--generate-report",
    42â†’    action="store_true",
    43â†’    default=None,
    44â†’    help="Generate a Markdown report after evaluation completes (incompatible with --skip-eval)",
    45â†’)
    46â†’
    47â†’_review_group = _parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group()
    48â†’_review_group.add_argument(
    49â†’    "--enable-review-tools",
    50â†’    action="store_true",
    51â†’    dest="enable_review_tools",
    52â†’    help="Enable PeerRead review generation tools (enabled by default)",
    53â†’)
    54â†’_review_group.add_argument(
    55â†’    "--no-review-tools",
    56â†’    action="store_false",
    57â†’    dest="enable_review_tools",
    58â†’    help="Disable PeerRead review generation tools (opt-out)",
    59â†’)
    60â†’_parser.set_defaults(enable_review_tools=None)
    61â†’
    62â†’_parser.add_argument(
    63â†’    "--chat-provider",
    64â†’    choices=sorted(PROVIDER_REGISTRY.keys()),
    65â†’    help="Specify the chat provider to use",
    66â†’)
    67â†’
    68â†’for _flag, _help in [
    69â†’    ("--query", "Specify the query to process"),
    70â†’    ("--chat-config-file", "Path to the chat configuration file"),
    71â†’    ("--paper-id", "Paper ID for PeerRead review (supports arxiv IDs like '1105.1072')"),
    72â†’    ("--judge-provider", "Tier 2 LLM judge provider (default: auto, inherits chat provider)"),
    73â†’    ("--judge-model", "Override Tier 2 judge LLM model (default: inherits chat model when auto)"),
    74â†’    ("--cc-solo-dir", "Path to CC solo session export directory for baseline comparison"),
    75â†’    ("--cc-teams-dir", "Path to CC Agent Teams artifacts directory for baseline comparison"),
    76â†’    ("--cc-teams-tasks-dir", "Path to CC Agent Teams tasks directory (auto-discovered if omitted)"),
    77â†’]:
    78â†’    _parser.add_argument(_flag, help=_help)
    79â†’
    80â†’_parser.add_argument("--token-limit", type=int, help="Override agent token limit (1000-1000000)")
    81â†’_parser.add_argument(
    82â†’    "--peerread-max-papers-per-sample-download",
    83â†’    type=int,
    84â†’    help="Max papers to download per split, overrides sample default",
    85â†’)
    86â†’_parser.add_argument(
    87â†’    "--engine",
    88â†’    default="mas",
    89â†’    choices=["mas", "cc"],
    90â†’    help="Execution engine: 'mas' (default) or 'cc' for Claude Code headless",
    91â†’)
    92â†’
    93â†’
    94â†’def parse_args(argv: list[str]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    95â†’    """Parse command line arguments into a dictionary.
    96â†’
    97â†’    Args:
    98â†’        argv: List of CLI argument strings (without the program name).
    99â†’
   100â†’    Returns:
   101â†’        Dictionary of explicitly-provided arguments (plus engine default).
   102â†’
   103â†’    Example:
   104â†’        >>> parse_args(["--chat-provider", "ollama", "--include-researcher"])
   105â†’        {'chat_provider': 'ollama', 'include_researcher': True, 'engine': 'mas'}
   106â†’    """
   107â†’    return {k: v for k, v in vars(_parser.parse_args(argv)).items() if v is not None}
   108â†’
   109â†’
   110â†’def _run_cc_engine(args: dict[str, Any], cc_teams: bool) -> Any:
   111â†’    """Run the Claude Code engine and return the result object.
   112â†’
   113â†’    Args:
   114â†’        args: Parsed CLI arguments dict (mutated: cc_solo_dir may be set).
   115â†’        cc_teams: Whether to use Agent Teams mode.
   116â†’
   117â†’    Returns:
   118â†’        CCResult object from the engine run.
   119â†’    """
   120â†’    from app.engines.cc_engine import build_cc_query, run_cc_solo, run_cc_teams
   121â†’
   122â†’    query = build_cc_query(args.get("query", ""), args.get("paper_id"), cc_teams=cc_teams)
   123â†’    cc_result_obj = (
   124â†’        run_cc_teams(query, timeout=600) if cc_teams else run_cc_solo(query, timeout=600)
   125â†’    )
   126â†’
   127â†’    if cc_result_obj.session_dir:
   128â†’        args["cc_solo_dir"] = cc_result_obj.session_dir
   129â†’
   130â†’    return cc_result_obj
   131â†’
   132â†’
   133â†’def _maybe_generate_report(result_dict: dict[str, Any], no_llm_suggestions: bool) -> None:
   134â†’    """Generate and save a Markdown report if composite result is available.
   135â†’
   136â†’    Args:
   137â†’        result_dict: Pipeline result containing composite_result and run_context.
   138â†’        no_llm_suggestions: Whether to disable LLM-assisted suggestions.
   139â†’    """
   140â†’    from datetime import datetime
   141â†’    from pathlib import Path
   142â†’
   143â†’    from app.reports.report_generator import generate_report, save_report
   144â†’    from app.reports.suggestion_engine import SuggestionEngine
   145â†’    from app.utils.log import logger
   146â†’
   147â†’    composite_result = result_dict.get("composite_result")
   148â†’    if composite_result is None:
   149â†’        logger.warning("--generate-report requested but no evaluation result available")
   150â†’        return
   151â†’
   152â†’    engine_obj = SuggestionEngine(no_llm_suggestions=no_llm_suggestions)
   153â†’    suggestions = engine_obj.generate(composite_result)
   154â†’    md = generate_report(composite_result, suggestions=suggestions)
   155â†’
   156â†’    # Reason: use run_context report_path when available; fall back to output/reports
   157â†’    run_context = result_dict.get("run_context")
   158â†’    if run_context is not None:
   159â†’        output_path = run_context.report_path
   160â†’    else:
   161â†’        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%dT%H%M%S")
   162â†’        output_path = Path(OUTPUT_PATH) / "reports" / f"{timestamp}.md"
   163â†’
   164â†’    save_report(md, output_path)
   165â†’    logger.info(f"Report written to {output_path}")
   166â†’    print(f"Report saved: {output_path}")
   167â†’
   168â†’
   169â†’def cli_main() -> None:
   170â†’    """Run the CLI application entry point.
   171â†’
   172â†’    Parses arguments, selects the execution engine, runs the pipeline,
   173â†’    and logs the artifact summary.
   174â†’    """
   175â†’    import sys
   176â†’
   177â†’    args = parse_args(argv[1:])
   178â†’    engine = args.pop("engine")
   179â†’    cc_teams = args.pop("cc_teams", False) or False
   180â†’    generate_report_flag = args.pop("generate_report", False) or False
   181â†’    no_llm_suggestions = args.pop("no_llm_suggestions", False) or False
   182â†’
   183â†’    # Reason: main() expects a JudgeSettings object, not raw provider/model strings.
   184â†’    # Mirrors SweepRunner._build_judge_settings() logic.
   185â†’    judge_provider = args.pop("judge_provider", None)
   186â†’    judge_model = args.pop("judge_model", None)
   187â†’    judge_settings = None
   188â†’    if judge_provider or judge_model:
   189â†’        from app.judge.evaluation_pipeline import JudgeSettings
   190â†’
   191â†’        kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {}
   192â†’        if judge_provider:
   193â†’            kwargs["tier2_provider"] = judge_provider
   194â†’        if judge_model:
   195â†’            kwargs["tier2_model"] = judge_model
   196â†’        judge_settings = JudgeSettings(**kwargs)
   197â†’    args["judge_settings"] = judge_settings
   198â†’
   199â†’    if engine == "cc" and not shutil.which("claude"):
   200â†’        print(
   201â†’            "error: --engine=cc requires the 'claude' CLI to be installed and on PATH",
   202â†’            file=sys.stderr,
   203â†’        )
   204â†’        exit(1)
   205â†’
   206â†’    from asyncio import run
   207â†’
   208â†’    from app.app import main
   209â†’    from app.utils.artifact_registry import get_artifact_registry
   210â†’    from app.utils.log import logger
   211â†’
   212â†’    logger.info(f"Used arguments: {args}")
   213â†’
   214â†’    cc_result_obj = _run_cc_engine(args, cc_teams) if engine == "cc" else None
   215â†’
   216â†’    try:
   217â†’        result_dict = run(main(**args, engine=engine, cc_result=cc_result_obj, cc_teams=cc_teams))
   218â†’        if generate_report_flag and result_dict:
   219â†’            _maybe_generate_report(result_dict, no_llm_suggestions)
   220â†’    finally:
   221â†’        logger.info(get_artifact_registry().format_summary_block())
   222â†’
   223â†’
   224â†’if __name__ == "__main__":
   225â†’    cli_main()
   226â†’

1â†’"""
     2â†’Main entry point for the Agents-eval application.
     3â†’
     4â†’This module initializes the agentic system, loads configuration files,
     5â†’handles user input, and orchestrates the multi-agent workflow using
     6â†’asynchronous execution. It integrates logging, tracing, and authentication,
     7â†’and supports both CLI and programmatic execution.
     8â†’
     9â†’Evaluation orchestration is delegated to app.judge.evaluation_runner.
    10â†’"""
    11â†’
    12â†’from __future__ import annotations
    13â†’
    14â†’import uuid as _uuid
    15â†’from collections.abc import Callable
    16â†’from pathlib import Path
    17â†’from typing import Any, TypeVar, cast
    18â†’
    19â†’from logfire import span
    20â†’
    21â†’# Reason: weave is optional - only import if available (requires WANDB_API_KEY)
    22â†’try:
    23â†’    from weave import op  # type: ignore[reportMissingImports]
    24â†’except ImportError:
    25â†’    # Fallback: no-op decorator when weave not installed
    26â†’    from typing import Any
    27â†’
    28â†’    _T = TypeVar("_T", bound=Callable[..., Any])
    29â†’
    30â†’    def op() -> Callable[[_T], _T]:  # type: ignore[reportRedeclaration]
    31â†’        """No-op decorator fallback when weave is unavailable."""
    32â†’
    33â†’        def decorator(func: _T) -> _T:
    34â†’            return func
    35â†’
    36â†’        return decorator
    37â†’
    38â†’
    39â†’from app.__init__ import __version__
    40â†’from app.agents.agent_system import (
    41â†’    get_manager,
    42â†’    initialize_logfire_instrumentation_from_settings,
    43â†’    run_manager,
    44â†’    setup_agent_env,
    45â†’)
    46â†’from app.config.app_env import AppEnv
    47â†’from app.config.config_app import (
    48â†’    CHAT_CONFIG_FILE,
    49â†’    CHAT_DEFAULT_PROVIDER,
    50â†’    DEFAULT_REVIEW_PROMPT_TEMPLATE,
    51â†’    PROJECT_NAME,
    52â†’)
    53â†’from app.config.judge_settings import JudgeSettings
    54â†’from app.data_models.app_models import ChatConfig
    55â†’from app.data_utils.datasets_peerread import (
    56â†’    download_peerread_dataset,
    57â†’)
    58â†’from app.judge.evaluation_runner import (
    59â†’    build_graph_from_trace as _build_graph_from_trace,
    60â†’)
    61â†’from app.judge.evaluation_runner import (
    62â†’    run_evaluation_if_enabled as _run_evaluation_if_enabled,
    63â†’)
    64â†’from app.judge.graph_export import persist_graph
    65â†’from app.utils.error_messages import generic_exception
    66â†’from app.utils.load_configs import load_config
    67â†’from app.utils.log import logger
    68â†’from app.utils.login import login
    69â†’from app.utils.paths import resolve_config_path
    70â†’from app.utils.run_context import RunContext, get_active_run_context, set_active_run_context
    71â†’
    72â†’CONFIG_FOLDER = "config"
    73â†’
    74â†’
    75â†’def _resolve_engine_type(engine: str, cc_teams: bool) -> str:
    76â†’    """Map engine name and cc_teams flag to engine_type for RunContext.
    77â†’
    78â†’    Args:
    79â†’        engine: Engine identifier ('mas' or 'cc').
    80â†’        cc_teams: Whether CC teams mode is active.
    81â†’
    82â†’    Returns:
    83â†’        Engine type string: 'mas', 'cc_solo', or 'cc_teams'.
    84â†’    """
    85â†’    if engine == "cc":
    86â†’        return "cc_teams" if cc_teams else "cc_solo"
    87â†’    return "mas"
    88â†’
    89â†’
    90â†’async def _run_agent_execution(
    91â†’    chat_config_file: str | Path,
    92â†’    chat_provider: str,
    93â†’    query: str,
    94â†’    paper_id: str | None,
    95â†’    enable_review_tools: bool,
    96â†’    include_researcher: bool,
    97â†’    include_analyst: bool,
    98â†’    include_synthesiser: bool,
    99â†’    token_limit: int | None,
   100â†’    execution_id: str | None = None,
   101â†’) -> tuple[str, dict[str, str], Any, str]:
   102â†’    """Execute agent system and return execution ID, prompts, manager output, and chat model.
   103â†’
   104â†’    Args:
   105â†’        chat_config_file: Path to chat configuration file.
   106â†’        chat_provider: LLM provider name.
   107â†’        query: User query string.
   108â†’        paper_id: Optional PeerRead paper ID.
   109â†’        enable_review_tools: Whether to enable review tools.
   110â†’        include_researcher: Whether to include researcher agent.
   111â†’        include_analyst: Whether to include analyst agent.
   112â†’        include_synthesiser: Whether to include synthesiser agent.
   113â†’        token_limit: Optional token limit override.
   114â†’        execution_id: Optional pre-generated execution ID forwarded to run_manager.
   115â†’
   116â†’    Returns:
   117â†’        Tuple of (execution_id, prompts dict, manager_output, chat_model).
   118â†’    """
   119â†’    chat_config = load_config(chat_config_file, ChatConfig)
   120â†’    prompts: dict[str, str] = cast(dict[str, str], chat_config.prompts)  # type: ignore[reportUnknownMemberType]
   121â†’
   122â†’    query, review_tools_enabled = _prepare_query(paper_id, query, prompts)
   123â†’    enable_review_tools = enable_review_tools or review_tools_enabled
   124â†’
   125â†’    chat_env_config = AppEnv()
   126â†’    agent_env = setup_agent_env(chat_provider, query, chat_config, chat_env_config, token_limit)
   127â†’
   128â†’    login(PROJECT_NAME, chat_env_config)
   129â†’    _initialize_instrumentation()
   130â†’
   131â†’    manager = get_manager(
   132â†’        agent_env.provider,
   133â†’        agent_env.provider_config,
   134â†’        agent_env.api_key,
   135â†’        agent_env.prompts,
   136â†’        include_researcher,
   137â†’        include_analyst,
   138â†’        include_synthesiser,
   139â†’        enable_review_tools=enable_review_tools,
   140â†’    )
   141â†’    execution_id, manager_output = await run_manager(
   142â†’        manager,
   143â†’        agent_env.query,
   144â†’        agent_env.provider,
   145â†’        agent_env.usage_limits,
   146â†’        execution_id=execution_id,
   147â†’    )
   148â†’
   149â†’    return execution_id, prompts, manager_output, agent_env.provider_config.model_name
   150â†’
   151â†’
   152â†’def _handle_download_mode(
   153â†’    download_full: bool, download_samples: bool, max_samples: int | None
   154â†’) -> bool:
   155â†’    """Handle dataset download modes. Returns True if download was performed."""
   156â†’    if download_full:
   157â†’        logger.info("Full download-only mode activated")
   158â†’        try:
   159â†’            download_peerread_dataset(peerread_max_papers_per_sample_download=None)
   160â†’            logger.info("Setup completed successfully. Exiting.")
   161â†’            return True
   162â†’        except Exception as e:
   163â†’            logger.error(f"Setup failed: {e}")
   164â†’            raise
   165â†’
   166â†’    if download_samples:
   167â†’        logger.info(f"Downloading only {max_samples} samples")
   168â†’        try:
   169â†’            download_peerread_dataset(max_samples)
   170â†’            logger.info("Setup completed successfully. Exiting.")
   171â†’            return True
   172â†’        except Exception as e:
   173â†’            logger.error(f"Setup failed: {e}")
   174â†’            raise
   175â†’
   176â†’    return False
   177â†’
   178â†’
   179â†’def _initialize_instrumentation() -> None:
   180â†’    """Initialize Logfire instrumentation if enabled in settings."""
   181â†’    judge_settings = JudgeSettings()
   182â†’    if judge_settings.logfire_enabled:
   183â†’        initialize_logfire_instrumentation_from_settings(judge_settings)
   184â†’
   185â†’
   186â†’def _prepare_query(paper_id: str | None, query: str, prompts: dict[str, str]) -> tuple[str, bool]:
   187â†’    """Prepare query and determine if review tools should be enabled."""
   188â†’    if paper_id:
   189â†’        if not query:
   190â†’            paper_review_template = prompts.get(
   191â†’                "paper_review_query", DEFAULT_REVIEW_PROMPT_TEMPLATE
   192â†’            )
   193â†’            query = paper_review_template.format(paper_id=paper_id)
   194â†’        logger.info(f"Paper review mode enabled for paper {paper_id}")
   195â†’        return query, True
   196â†’
   197â†’    if not query:
   198â†’        default_prompt = prompts.get("default_query", "What would you like to research? ")
   199â†’        query = input(f"{default_prompt} ")
   200â†’
   201â†’    return query, False
   202â†’
   203â†’
   204â†’def _prepare_result_dict(
   205â†’    composite_result: Any | None,
   206â†’    graph: Any | None,
   207â†’    execution_id: str | None = None,
   208â†’    run_context: RunContext | None = None,
   209â†’) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   210â†’    """Prepare result dictionary for GUI usage.
   211â†’
   212â†’    Args:
   213â†’        composite_result: Evaluation result
   214â†’        graph: Interaction graph
   215â†’        execution_id: Execution trace ID for display on Evaluation page
   216â†’        run_context: Optional per-run context for artifact paths
   217â†’
   218â†’    Returns:
   219â†’        Dict with result, graph, execution_id, and run_context if available, None otherwise
   220â†’    """
   221â†’    # Return dict if we have either result or graph
   222â†’    if composite_result is not None or graph is not None:
   223â†’        return {
   224â†’            "composite_result": composite_result,
   225â†’            "graph": graph,
   226â†’            # S8-F8.2: include execution_id for Evaluation Results page threading
   227â†’            "execution_id": execution_id,
   228â†’            "run_context": run_context,
   229â†’        }
   230â†’    return None
   231â†’
   232â†’
   233â†’@op()  # type: ignore[reportUntypedFunctionDecorator]
   234â†’def _extract_cc_artifacts(cc_result: Any) -> tuple[str, Any, Any]:
   235â†’    """Extract execution ID, graph, and trace data from a CC engine result.
   236â†’
   237â†’    Args:
   238â†’        cc_result: CCResult from solo or teams execution.
   239â†’
   240â†’    Returns:
   241â†’        Tuple of (execution_id, interaction_graph, graph_trace).
   242â†’    """
   243â†’    from app.engines.cc_engine import cc_result_to_graph_trace
   244â†’    from app.judge.graph_builder import build_interaction_graph
   245â†’
   246â†’    graph_trace = cc_result_to_graph_trace(cc_result)
   247â†’    return cc_result.execution_id, build_interaction_graph(graph_trace), graph_trace
   248â†’
   249â†’
   250â†’async def _run_cc_engine_path(
   251â†’    cc_result: Any,
   252â†’    skip_eval: bool,
   253â†’    paper_id: str | None,
   254â†’    cc_solo_dir: str | None,
   255â†’    cc_teams_dir: str | None,
   256â†’    cc_teams_tasks_dir: str | None,
   257â†’    chat_provider: str,
   258â†’    judge_settings: JudgeSettings | None,
   259â†’    cc_teams: bool = False,
   260â†’    run_dir: Path | None = None,
   261â†’    cc_model: str | None = None,
   262â†’) -> tuple[Any, Any, str | None]:
   263â†’    """Execute CC engine path: extract artifacts, evaluate, set engine_type.
   264â†’
   265â†’    Args:
   266â†’        cc_result: CCResult from solo or teams execution.
   267â†’        skip_eval: Whether to skip evaluation.
   268â†’        paper_id: Optional PeerRead paper ID.
   269â†’        cc_solo_dir: CC solo trace directory.
   270â†’        cc_teams_dir: CC teams trace directory.
   271â†’        cc_teams_tasks_dir: CC teams tasks directory.
   272â†’        chat_provider: LLM provider name.
   273â†’        judge_settings: Optional judge settings.
   274â†’        cc_teams: Whether CC was run in teams mode (source of truth for engine_type).
   275â†’        run_dir: Per-run output directory from up-front RunContext.
   276â†’        cc_model: CC model name, forwarded as chat_model to evaluation pipeline.
   277â†’
   278â†’    Returns:
   279â†’        Tuple of (composite_result, graph, execution_id).
   280â†’    """
   281â†’    from app.engines.cc_engine import extract_cc_review_text
   282â†’
   283â†’    execution_id, graph, graph_trace = _extract_cc_artifacts(cc_result)
   284â†’
   285â†’    engine_type = "cc_teams" if cc_teams else "cc_solo"
   286â†’
   287â†’    # S10-AC2: extract review text from CC output for evaluation
   288â†’    cc_review_text = extract_cc_review_text(cc_result)
   289â†’    composite_result = await _run_evaluation_if_enabled(
   290â†’        skip_eval,
   291â†’        paper_id,
   292â†’        execution_id,
   293â†’        cc_solo_dir,
   294â†’        cc_teams_dir,
   295â†’        cc_teams_tasks_dir,
   296â†’        chat_provider,
   297â†’        chat_model=cc_model,
   298â†’        judge_settings=judge_settings,
   299â†’        manager_output=None,
   300â†’        review_text=cc_review_text,
   301â†’        run_dir=run_dir,
   302â†’        execution_trace=graph_trace,
   303â†’        engine_type=engine_type,
   304â†’    )
   305â†’    if composite_result is not None:
   306â†’        composite_result.engine_type = engine_type
   307â†’    return composite_result, graph, execution_id
   308â†’
   309â†’
   310â†’async def _run_mas_engine_path(
   311â†’    chat_config_file: str | Path,
   312â†’    chat_provider: str,
   313â†’    query: str,
   314â†’    paper_id: str | None,
   315â†’    enable_review_tools: bool,
   316â†’    include_researcher: bool,
   317â†’    include_analyst: bool,
   318â†’    include_synthesiser: bool,
   319â†’    token_limit: int | None,
   320â†’    skip_eval: bool,
   321â†’    cc_solo_dir: str | None,
   322â†’    cc_teams_dir: str | None,
   323â†’    cc_teams_tasks_dir: str | None,
   324â†’    judge_settings: JudgeSettings | None,
   325â†’    execution_id: str | None = None,
   326â†’    run_dir: Path | None = None,
   327â†’) -> tuple[Any, Any, str | None]:
   328â†’    """Execute MAS engine path: run agents, evaluate, build graph.
   329â†’
   330â†’    Args:
   331â†’        chat_config_file: Path to chat configuration file.
   332â†’        chat_provider: LLM provider name.
   333â†’        query: User query string.
   334â†’        paper_id: Optional PeerRead paper ID.
   335â†’        enable_review_tools: Whether to enable review tools.
   336â†’        include_researcher: Whether to include researcher agent.
   337â†’        include_analyst: Whether to include analyst agent.
   338â†’        include_synthesiser: Whether to include synthesiser agent.
   339â†’        token_limit: Optional token limit override.
   340â†’        skip_eval: Whether to skip evaluation.
   341â†’        cc_solo_dir: CC solo trace directory.
   342â†’        cc_teams_dir: CC teams trace directory.
   343â†’        cc_teams_tasks_dir: CC teams tasks directory.
   344â†’        judge_settings: Optional judge settings.
   345â†’        execution_id: Pre-generated execution ID from main().
   346â†’        run_dir: Per-run output directory from up-front RunContext.
   347â†’
   348â†’    Returns:
   349â†’        Tuple of (composite_result, graph, execution_id).
   350â†’    """
   351â†’    if not chat_provider:
   352â†’        chat_provider = input("Which inference chat_provider to use? ")
   353â†’
   354â†’    execution_id, _, manager_output, chat_model = await _run_agent_execution(
   355â†’        chat_config_file,
   356â†’        chat_provider,
   357â†’        query,
   358â†’        paper_id,
   359â†’        enable_review_tools,
   360â†’        include_researcher,
   361â†’        include_analyst,
   362â†’        include_synthesiser,
   363â†’        token_limit,
   364â†’        execution_id=execution_id,
   365â†’    )
   366â†’
   367â†’    composite_result = await _run_evaluation_if_enabled(
   368â†’        skip_eval,
   369â†’        paper_id,
   370â†’        execution_id,
   371â†’        cc_solo_dir,
   372â†’        cc_teams_dir,
   373â†’        cc_teams_tasks_dir,
   374â†’        chat_provider,
   375â†’        chat_model=chat_model,
   376â†’        judge_settings=judge_settings,
   377â†’        manager_output=manager_output,
   378â†’        run_dir=run_dir,
   379â†’    )
   380â†’
   381â†’    graph = _build_graph_from_trace(execution_id) if execution_id else None
   382â†’    return composite_result, graph, execution_id
   383â†’
   384â†’
   385â†’async def main(
   386â†’    chat_provider: str = CHAT_DEFAULT_PROVIDER,
   387â†’    query: str = "",
   388â†’    include_researcher: bool = False,
   389â†’    include_analyst: bool = False,
   390â†’    include_synthesiser: bool = False,
   391â†’    chat_config_file: str | Path | None = None,
   392â†’    enable_review_tools: bool = False,
   393â†’    paper_id: str | None = None,
   394â†’    skip_eval: bool = False,
   395â†’    download_peerread_full_only: bool = False,
   396â†’    download_peerread_samples_only: bool = False,
   397â†’    peerread_max_papers_per_sample_download: int | None = 5,
   398â†’    cc_solo_dir: str | None = None,
   399â†’    cc_teams_dir: str | None = None,
   400â†’    cc_teams_tasks_dir: str | None = None,
   401â†’    token_limit: int | None = None,
   402â†’    judge_settings: JudgeSettings | None = None,
   403â†’    engine: str = "mas",
   404â†’    cc_result: Any | None = None,
   405â†’    cc_teams: bool = False,
   406â†’    cc_model: str | None = None,
   407â†’) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
   408â†’    """Main entry point for the application.
   409â†’
   410â†’    Returns:
   411â†’        Dictionary with 'composite_result' (CompositeResult) and 'graph' (nx.DiGraph)
   412â†’        if evaluation runs successfully, None otherwise (CLI mode or download-only).
   413â†’    """
   414â†’    logger.info(f"Starting app '{PROJECT_NAME}' v{__version__} (engine={engine})")
   415â†’
   416â†’    if _handle_download_mode(
   417â†’        download_peerread_full_only,
   418â†’        download_peerread_samples_only,
   419â†’        peerread_max_papers_per_sample_download,
   420â†’    ):
   421â†’        return None
   422â†’
   423â†’    try:
   424â†’        if chat_config_file is None:
   425â†’            chat_config_file = resolve_config_path(CHAT_CONFIG_FILE)
   426â†’        logger.info(f"Chat config file: {chat_config_file}")
   427â†’
   428â†’        with span("main()"):
   429â†’            # Generate execution_id up-front so RunContext is active before engine runs
   430â†’            execution_id = f"exec_{_uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]}"
   431â†’            run_ctx = RunContext.create(
   432â†’                engine_type=_resolve_engine_type(engine, cc_teams),
   433â†’                paper_id=paper_id or "unknown",
   434â†’                execution_id=execution_id,
   435â†’            )
   436â†’            set_active_run_context(run_ctx)
   437â†’
   438â†’            # S10-F1: CC engine branch â€” skip MAS, use CC result directly
   439â†’            if engine == "cc" and cc_result is not None:
   440â†’                composite_result, graph, execution_id = await _run_cc_engine_path(
   441â†’                    cc_result,
   442â†’                    skip_eval,
   443â†’                    paper_id,
   444â†’                    cc_solo_dir,
   445â†’                    cc_teams_dir,
   446â†’                    cc_teams_tasks_dir,
   447â†’                    chat_provider,
   448â†’                    judge_settings,
   449â†’                    cc_teams=cc_teams,
   450â†’                    run_dir=run_ctx.run_dir,
   451â†’                    cc_model=cc_model,
   452â†’                )
   453â†’            else:
   454â†’                composite_result, graph, execution_id = await _run_mas_engine_path(
   455â†’                    chat_config_file,
   456â†’                    chat_provider,
   457â†’                    query,
   458â†’                    paper_id,
   459â†’                    enable_review_tools,
   460â†’                    include_researcher,
   461â†’                    include_analyst,
   462â†’                    include_synthesiser,
   463â†’                    token_limit,
   464â†’                    skip_eval,
   465â†’                    cc_solo_dir,
   466â†’                    cc_teams_dir,
   467â†’                    cc_teams_tasks_dir,
   468â†’                    judge_settings,
   469â†’                    execution_id=execution_id,
   470â†’                    run_dir=run_ctx.run_dir,
   471â†’                )
   472â†’
   473â†’            persist_graph(graph, run_ctx.run_dir)
   474â†’
   475â†’            logger.info(f"Exiting app '{PROJECT_NAME}'")
   476â†’            return _prepare_result_dict(
   477â†’                composite_result, graph, execution_id, run_context=get_active_run_context()
   478â†’            )
   479â†’
   480â†’    except Exception as e:
   481â†’        msg = generic_exception(f"Aborting app '{PROJECT_NAME}' with: {e}")
   482â†’        logger.exception(msg)
   483â†’        raise Exception(msg) from e
   484â†’    finally:
   485â†’        set_active_run_context(None)
   486â†’
